heading: Omitted
label: 574 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , ch. IX, § 101, , which related to availability of appropriation for payments to school districts, was from the Civil Functions Appropriation Act, 1951, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts.act Sept. 6, 1950, ch. 89664 Stat. 726
